info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' vyAptO vevezwi vevizwe ... ' (Slo. 174) iti devaH  ' vizf ' iti kASakftsnaH  ' vizlf iti kAtantre pAWaH ' iti ca tatra uktam  ' udidityeke  hariditi drume ' iti DA.kA. vyAKyA (2.55)

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'imAM devatAM parivevezmItyenaM pari vevizyAt' (aTarva0 15138) parivevezmi BojanaM nivedayAmi
'kanIyAYjyAyAMsaM parivevezwi' (kAWaka0 367)
'aditiM parivevizati' (E0 brA0 117)
'aTa pAtrARi nirRenijati tErniRijya parivevizati' (Sa0 brA0 1312)
'mAWarakORqinyO parivevizAtAm' (BAzye) ukto'rTaH
'mantrahInaM kriyAhInaM yacCrAdDaM parivizyate triBirvarREH…' (BA0 anu0 239) BojanAma nivedyate
'aTa ha SOnakaM ca kApeyamaBipratAriRaM ca kAkzaseniM parivizyamARO brahmacArI biBikze' (CAM0 u0 435) parivizyamARO niveditaBojanO BojayizyamARO
'dvitIyayA''ditye parivizyamARe'kzatataRqulAjuhuyAt' (go0 gf0 4529) parivizyamARe parivezavati jAte
'vayaM parivizwAH parivezwAro vo BUyAsma' (BA0 SrO0 7141) parivizwA niveditaBojanAH BojitAH
'dadBirna jihvA parivizwamAdat' (aTarva0 20166) parivizwaM BojanAya niveditam
'candraM yaTA parivizwaM sasanDyam' (BA0 anu0 1488) parivizwaM kftaparivezam
'vAtAdyErmaRqalIBUtAH sUryacandramasoH karAH mAlABA vyomni dfSyante parivezastu sa smftaH..' nigadavyAKyAtam
'vedyA niDApayeccEva ratnAni viviDAni ca sikatAparivezASca tato'gniM saminDayet' (mAtsya pu0 2398).. parivezaH parikzepaH
'viprARAM pravarAH sarve cakruSca parivezaRam' (rA0 79128) parivezaRaM BojanA
'SyAmaM ruDiraparyantaM baBUva parivezaRam (rA0 3233) upasUryakam
'sUryA candramasorDoraM dfSyate parivezaRam' (BA0 vana0 22417) parivezaRaM parivezaH
'viSvaM vivezwi draviRamupa kzu' (f0 106112) upavivezwi (=vevezwi) yatnena cezwayA vA'vApnoti
'antarvedi SAKAyAH parvARyasarvARi praSAtya mUlataH SAKAM parivAsya (=CittvA) upavezaM karoti' (Apa0 SrO0 1266) aNgAraprezaRArTaM kAzWamupaveza iti samAKyAyata iti rudradattaH
'aDivfkzasUrye AviHsUrye vA Dfzwirasi brahma yacCetyupavezamAdAya' (Apa0 SrO0 6112) upavezaSabda udGAwanArTe kAzWe vartata ityuktaprAyaM purastAt
'kiM SAKAcCedanasyoBayaM prayojakaM SAKA upavezaSca uta SAKA prayojikA upavezo'nunizpAdI' (mI0 428 SA0 BA0) ukto'rTaH
'ityupavezamAdAya' (BA0 SrO0 6105) upavezo manTadaRqaH
